Class XMLSalesFormatter

java.lang.Object
  XMLSalesFormatter
All Implemented Interfaces:
SalesFormatter
public class XMLSalesFormatter
extends Object
implements SalesFormatter

This class implements a method that obtains an XML representation of a Sales object.

Version:
1.0.0
Author:
author name
See Also:
SalesFormatter, Sales, Order, OrderItem, Product

Method Summary
 String formatSales(Sales sales)
          Obtains a XML representation of the specified sales.

          Obtains the single instance of class XMLSalesFormatter
